[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 010100000 2
2 000100010 2
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 000000000 a

01 001000000 1
12 000110000 2
23 000001000 1
34 010000000 1
45 001001111 5
56 100000000 1
67 011011000 4
70 000100010 2 match 2

24 010000000 1

60 010100000 2 match 1
71 000000000 a match 0 3 4 5 6 7
